short.en: A small paper twist of bright honey sweets.
short.cs: Malý papírový sáček s jasně barevnými medovými bonbony.

long.en: A small twist of waxed paper holding a few bright sweets — honey, berry, and one that tastes of mint. They are small and sticky and they make the head feel a little brighter.
long.cs: Malý sáček z voskovaného papíru s pár jasně barevnými bonbony — medový, lesní a jeden mátový. Jsou drobné a lepkavé a po nich se ti v hlavě trošku rozjasní.

no_target.self: you pop a sweet into your mouth. Your head feels a little clearer.
no_target.others: {actor} pops a sweet into their mouth.

to_target.self: you offer a sweet to {target}, who pops it into their mouth.
to_target.others: {actor} offers a sweet to {target}, who pops it into their mouth.

no_target.self: strčíš si bonbon do pusy. V hlavě se ti trochu rozjasní.

to_target.self: podáš bonbon {target.dat} a ten si ho strčí do pusy.
to_target.others: {actor} podává bonbon {target.dat} a ten si ho strčí do pusy.
